title: Update: Missing woman found safe
description: GEORGE NEWS - The George community can...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The George community can breathe a sigh of relief.


> Thaila Roelfse from Pacaltsdorp, who was reported missing earlier this week, was found safe in Knysna on Thursday evening, 4 September.


She was last seen on Wednesday 3 September, after she went to town to renew her bank card and ID. Her disappearance sparked widespread concern among her family, friends, and the broader George community.

According to information received, Thaila is safe and well.

Her family and the George CPF have expressed their gratitude to everyone who shared information and assisted in efforts to help find her.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
